description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a pink and white exterior, featuring a flat roof and a partially open central courtyard visible from above. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, a small balcony above the entrance, and a landscaped garden area with a tree and shrubs. The side and rear walls are mostly solid with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy, while the front is more open and inviting. The house has a mix of concrete, glass, and metal materials, with a wooden gate at the rear. The landscaping includes neatly trimmed hedges and a paved walkway. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story pink and white house with a flat roof, garage, landscaped front yard, and a central open courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway, main entrance, balcony, and landscaped garden with a tree.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall, minimal windows, and partial view of the courtyard and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large wooden gate, solid wall, and a glimpse into the open courtyard area.
description_view_3: Right side view with solid walls, a few windows, and a clear view of the garden and tree in the front yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small balcony above, concrete steps, and landscaped garden flanking the entrance.
